title: Learning a hierarchy
summary: We’ve developed a hierarchical reinforcement learning algorithm that learns high-level actions useful for solving a range of tasks, allowing fast solving of tasks requiring thousands of timesteps. Our algorithm, when applied to a set of navigation problems, discovers a set of high-level actions for walking and crawling
summaryZh: 我们开发了一种分层强化学习算法，该算法可以学习有助于解决一系列任务的高级操作，从而可以快速解决需要数千个时间步长的任务。我们的算法在应用于一组导航问题时，发现了一组用于步行和爬行的高级动作
highlights: We’ve developed a hierarchical reinforcement learning algorithm that learns high-level actions useful for solving a range of tasks, allowing fast solving of tasks requiring thousan
Our algorithm, when applied to a set of navigation problems, discovers a set of high-level actions for walking and crawling

title: Generalizing from simulation
summary: Our latest robotics techniques allow robot controllers, trained entirely in simulation and deployed on physical robots, to react to unplanned changes in the environment as they solve simple tasks. That is, we’ve used these techniques to build closed-loop systems rather than open-loop ones as before.
summaryZh: 我们最新的机器人技术使完全接受模拟训练并在物理机器人上部署的机器人控制器能够在解决简单任务时对环境中的意外变化做出反应。也就是说，我们已经使用这些技术来构建闭环系统，而不是像以前那样使用开环系统。
highlights: Our latest robotics techniques allow robot controllers, trained entirely in simulation and deployed on physical robots, to react to unplanned changes in the environment as they sol
That is, we’ve used these techniques to build closed-loop systems rather than open-loop ones as before.

title: Meta-learning for wrestling
summary: We show that for the task of simulated robot wrestling, a meta-learning agent can learn to quickly defeat a stronger non-meta-learning agent, and also show that the meta-learning agent can adapt to physical malfunction.
summaryZh: 我们表明，对于模拟机器人摔跤的任务，元学习智能体可以学习快速击败更强的非元学习智能体，并且还表明元学习智能体可以适应物理故障。

title: Competitive self-play
summary: We’ve found that self-play allows simulated AIs to discover physical skills like tackling, ducking, faking, kicking, catching, and diving for the ball, without explicitly designing an environment with these skills in mind. Self-play ensures that the environment is always the right difficulty for an AI to improve. Taken
summaryZh: 我们发现，自我游戏允许模拟人工智能发现身体技能，如铲球、躲避、伪装、踢球、接球和跳水，而无需明确设计考虑这些技能的环境。自我游戏确保环境始终是人工智能改进的正确难度。采取
